rule_summary: Confirm property address is permitted for STR use and not in restricted zone
notes: CRITICAL: Must verify property location is eligible for STR permit. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Zone classification verification address eligibility confirmation.

rule_summary: Maximum occupancy limit - Austin Code allows max 6 unrelated adults
notes: Austin Code 25-2-511 establishes 6 unrelated adult maximum. Must cross-reference physical bed count from Section 02. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: HOA occupancy restrictions (if any) physical bed count listing max occupancy setting.

rule_summary: Noise limits 75dB daytime 85dB nighttime (varies by zone). Quiet hours enforcement.
notes: Noise violations can result in $500-$2000 fines plus permit suspension. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Specific zone noise limits quiet hours definition guest-facing policy language.

rule_summary: Parking space count and street parking restrictions
notes: Must verify from HOA CC&Rs and local parking ordinances. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Number of allowed parking spaces street parking rules guest parking restrictions.

rule_summary: Trash bin placement collection days prohibited items
notes: Improper trash handling causes neighbor complaints. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Collection day schedule bin placement rules recycling requirements.
